title: astronium urundeuva var. candollei
intro: Astronium urundeuva var. candollei, also known as Candolle's astronium, is a variety of the Astronium urundeuva tree, a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Candolle's astronium include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and also used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
